aggregate_return_metrics_r.note: Summed per-window gross_return_r across independent windows. Windows are independent fragments, not one continuous market history.

metrics_availability.absolute_drawdown_quote_note: Max drawdown available as r-multiple only (max_drawdown_r). Absolute quote drawdown requires an equity curve with per-bar nav.
metrics_availability.equity_curve_note: Per-bar equity snapshots not available. Drawdown computed from end-of-trade point estimates only.
metrics_availability.sharpe_ratio_note: Requires return time series (per-bar or per-trade with durations). Not computable from end-of-trade point returns alone.
metrics_availability.slippage_note: Execution simulator slippage is accounted for in fill prices. Per-trade slippage breakdown not exposed in trade dict.

sample_size_gate.note: PASS only if total closed trades >= 20 and at least 3 windows have trades; otherwise INSUFFICIENT.

verdict.economic_assessment: Aggregate economics are materially negative. Do not promote.
verdict.next_recommended_step: Multi-window sample threshold reached, but aggregate economics are materially negative. Create a narrow PARK/REJECT decision slice and, if useful, a seed league-table entry explicitly marked PARK.
